Name: UInputComponent
Description:
Implement an Actor component for input bindings.
 
  An Input Component is a transient component that enables an Actor to bind various forms of input events to delegate functions.  
  Input components are processed from a stack managed by the PlayerController and processed by the PlayerInput.
  Each binding can consume the input event preventing other components on the input stack from processing the input.

Functions.Name: IsControllerKeyDown
Functions.Description: Returns true if the given keybutton is pressed on the input of the controller (if present)

Functions.Name: WasControllerKeyJustPressed
Functions.Description: Returns true if the given keybutton was up last frame and down this frame.

Functions.Name: WasControllerKeyJustReleased
Functions.Description: Returns true if the given keybutton was down last frame and up this frame.

Functions.Name: GetControllerAnalogKeyState
Functions.Description: Returns the analog value for the given keybutton.  If analog isn't supported, returns 1 for down and 0 for up.

Functions.Name: GetControllerVectorKeyState
Functions.Description: Returns the vector value for the given keybutton.

Functions.Name: GetTouchState
Functions.Description: Returns the location of a touch, and if it's held down

Functions.Name: GetControllerKeyTimeDown
Functions.Description: Returns how long the given keybutton has been down.  Returns 0 if it's up or it just went down this frame.

Functions.Name: GetControllerMouseDelta
Functions.Description: Retrieves how far the mouse moved this frame.

Functions.Name: GetControllerAnalogStickState
Functions.Description: Retrieves the X and Y displacement of the given analog stick.  For WhickStick, 0 = left, 1 = right.
